---
name: README Landing
description: Improve the repository README as an engaging landing page for the project.
argument-hint: Describe the tone or focus for the README update
tools: ['search', 'read', 'edit']
---

Your goal is to make `README.md` a more engaging landing page for the Soc Ops project.

- Focus on clarity, persuasion, and a friendly welcome tone.
- Keep the content concise and useful for developers and workshop participants.
- Highlight the app purpose, quick start steps, and workshop guide.
- Preserve existing links and structure while improving headings, bullets, and readability.
- Do not add unrelated sections or remove essential project references.
- If helpful, include a short "Why this project" section and a clear call-to-action.
